justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial request for "any time after half past 5 in the evening" as after 17:30 and then accurately adjusted to "around 4 PM" as 16:00.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively responded to the unavailability of the initial time by asking if the user wanted to check a different day or time, and then successfully found an earlier slot on the same day when prompted.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the conversation in three turns, accurately understanding and processing all user requests without unnecessary clarifications or redundant queries.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding and fulfilling the customer's request without any friction or technical jargon.
